common.title: Rwanda AI Assistant
common.description: Get help with insurance, tourism, farming, and business in Rwanda

chat.welcome_message: Hello! I can help you with insurance quotes, tourism planning, farming advice, and business registration in Rwanda.
chat.example_insurance: Try: 'Get me a third-party motor quote for a Toyota in Kigali'
chat.example_tourism: Try: 'Plan a 1-day tour near Musanze on a 50k RWF budget'
chat.example_farming: Try: 'I grow maize in Nyamagabe; what should I do this month?'
chat.example_business: Try: 'How do I register a sole proprietorship?'
chat.error: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.
